en_title: Mafia: The Old Country Is Getting a Story DLC Very Soon
subtitle: 萨列里归来
opus_summary: 《黑手党：旧国度》8月14日推出剧情DLC「荣誉之人」，售价10美元(约合人民币72元)。新增两个故事章节，聚焦萨列里出狱后经历，加入新武器、载具和场景。

paragraphs.en: Mafia: The Old Country is getting a surprise story expansion this August. The first trailer for Mafia: The Old Country's DLC, Man of Honor, confirmed that Don Salieri will return in this story expansion. The charcater was prominently featured as the antagonist in the original Mafia game. The new expansion will only cost $10 and will release on August 14th, adding two new story chapters that take place in the middle of the main game's story and additional Free Ride content.
paragraphs.cn: 《黑手党：旧国度》将于今年8月迎来一个惊喜剧情扩展包。该DLC名为「荣誉之人」，首支预告确认唐·萨列里将回归。这一角色在初代《黑手党》中作为主要反派登场。新扩展包仅售10美元(约合人民币72元)，将于8月14日发布，新增两个故事章节，穿插在主线剧情中间，并附带额外的自由漫游内容。

paragraphs.en: The new missions take place in winter 1905 and sees Enzo assisting Ennio Salieri following his release from prison. The expansion will feature new weapons, vehicles, and environments for players to participate in.
paragraphs.cn: 新任务设定在1905年冬季，恩佐将协助出狱后的恩尼奥·萨列里。扩展包将加入新武器、载具和环境供玩家体验。

paragraphs.en: In an interview with Polygon , associate design director Josh Zammit explained the decision to revisit the character of Salieri, long before he becomes the kingpin we know him as in the original Mafia.
paragraphs.cn: 在接受Polygon采访时，副设计总监Josh Zammit解释了为何选择重温萨列里这一角色——远在他成为初代《黑手党》中那个大人物之前。

paragraphs.en: “We dive into some of the stories about what [Salieri] was doing beforehand, stuff that players of the previous games won't know,” Zammit told Polygon. “Ultimately, his goal to get to America is his driving factor at this point. And maybe that plays into the later story, right? Plants a little bit of a seed in Enzo's head about what he might want to do with his future. That was an interesting thing for us to play with as well — this idea that where did he get this idea of going to the new life? Maybe there was somebody there that was driving it home and sort of eventually it stuck with Enzo as an opportunity as well.”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们深入挖掘了萨列里之前的一些故事，那些前作玩家不知道的事情，」Zammit告诉Polygon，「最终，他前往美国的愿望是此刻的驱动力。也许这会影响后来的故事，对吧？在恩佐心中埋下一颗种子，让他思考未来想做什么。这对我们来说也很有趣——他怎么会想到去追求新生活？也许有人一直在强调这一点，最终恩佐也将其视为一个机会。」

paragraphs.en: The news was a bit of a surprise, as Mafia: The Old Country was designed as a smaller-scale title. It was released last year as a $50 title and isn't a big AAA open-world game that takes dozens of hours to complete. However, the game was a sizable hit, prompting Hanger 13 to keep supporting it .
paragraphs.cn: 这一消息有些出人意料，因为《黑手党：旧国度》本身定位是一款规模较小的作品。它去年以50美元(约合人民币358元)的价格发售，并非那种需要数十小时才能通关的大型AAA开放世界游戏。然而，该作取得了相当的成功，促使Hanger 13持续为其提供支持。

paragraphs.en: We gave the game an 8/10 in our review , praising it for being a "conventional but effective return to the linear and tightly story-driven format of the original Mafia and Mafia II, and it boasts a wonderful eye and ear for detail."
paragraphs.cn: 我们在评测中给该作打出了8/10的评分，称赞其「以传统但有效的方式回归了初代《黑手党》和《黑手党2》的线性、紧密叙事模式，并且在细节上展现了出色的视听表现。」

paragraphs.en: For all other things announced tonight, be sure to check out our roundup of everything announced at Summer Game Fest , where we will be posting all of the biggest announcements and news.
paragraphs.cn: 至于今晚公布的其他内容，请务必查看我们的夏日游戏节全部公告汇总，我们将发布所有重大消息和新闻。

paragraphs.en: Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道游戏、电影等所有娱乐内容。你可以在X上关注他 @Cade_Onder。
